items.name: 泊のまるきぶね
items.description: 三本の丸木舟で作られた準構造船。太平洋沿岸の丸木舟としては最北端とされる。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the folk-implements category (dugout canoe). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1963-05-15. Located in the Tomari district.

items.name: 大石平遺跡出土品
items.description: 縄文時代の遺物198点。青森県立郷土館文化財調査研究センターに保管。定型型製品。

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Oishitai Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category (excavated artifacts). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1995-06-15. Located in Oishitai.

items.name: 小川原湖のハクチョウ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 小川原湖に飛来する白鳥。村指定天然記念物（動物）。

en.description_en: A natural monument (swans). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1972-12-05. Located at Lake Ogawara.

items.name: 宝生の柴栗舞
items.description: 宝生地区に伝わる柴栗舞。泊のまるきぶね等と並ぶ村の伝統芸能。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (folk dance). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located in the Hosho district.

items.name: 貴的の柴栗舞
items.description: 貴的地区に伝わる柴栗舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (folk dance). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located in the Kiteki district.

items.name: 諏訪の神楽舞
items.description: 諏訪地区に伝わる神楽舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (kagura dance). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located in the Suwa district.

items.name: 新山権現の神楽舞
items.description: 新山権現に伝わる神楽舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (kagura dance). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located in Rokkasho Village.

items.name: 大奥寺のいちい
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 樹齢300年を超えるイチイの大木（村指定天然記念物）。

en.description_en: A natural monument (Japanese yew tree). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-01. Located in the precincts of Ookuji Temple.

items.name: 千倉中学校のしなのき
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 千倉中学校敷地内のシナノキ大木。本木以外にも数本の木がある。村指定天然記念物。

en.name_en: Japanese Linden of Chikura Junior High School
en.description_en: A natural monument (Japanese linden tree). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located at Chikura Junior High School.

items.name: 能登七右エ門文書
items.description: 昭和41年(1751年)に七代国司が法廷に提出する証拠品を定めたもの。船の上と下の創造の様子が描かれている。9件。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old-documents category (documents). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1974-03-29. Located in Funadomari Taro.

items.name: 秋沢文書
items.description: 秋山山の麓などで使われていた問いの資料。値のある古文書。2件。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old-documents category (documents). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1979-03-12. Located in Yokochiichiya.

items.name: 木村文書
items.description: 寛文2年(1672年)に内戸の藩野守がたになった木村家に伝わる文書。殿藩の名前が記されている。1件。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old-documents category (documents). Village-designated by Rokkasho Village. Designated on 1979-05-30. Located in Kimuradate.
